text.title: Infrastructure Layer and API Controller
text.summary: EF Core DbContext dispatching domain events at SaveChanges, IEntityTypeConfiguration for value objects, and MediatR-backed API controller.

rule.statement: API project is the composition root only; it must not reference EntityFrameworkCore or Infrastructure types directly (composition root wiring in AddInfrastructure() extension only).
rule.rationale: Agents add EFCore imports to the API project for "convenience"; this couples the presentation layer to persistence and defeats the layering purpose.
